title: BearerAuth/BasicAuth credential fields are pub with no log-safety warning on the struct
description: BearerAuth::token, BasicAuth::username, and BasicAuth::password are pub fields. The auth_header() method has a doc comment 'must not log the returned value', but the struct fields have no such warning. A contributor adding debug tracing of the auth provider (e.g. tracing::debug\!("{:?}", auth)) would not see any signal that the struct contains credentials. The log-safety contract is documented on the method, not on the data. Add a struct-level doc comment or field-level comment on the credential fields stating they must not be logged.
